zh.Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Fran: 法國皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額
zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Tempest於大約1307年出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾時，他的父親Sir John Tempest25歲，母親Isabel15歲。他於大約1333年與Catherine Sherborn在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1383年在他的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Picardie, Fran: 法国皮卡迪索姆可雷希--朋提額
zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Tempest于大约1307年出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾时，他的父亲Sir John Tempest25岁，母亲Isabel15岁。他于大约1333年与Catherine Sherborn在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1346年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1383年在他的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Tempest was born about 1307, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir John Tempest, was 25 and his mother, Isabel, was 15. He married Catherine Sherborn about 1333, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1346. He died about 1383, in his hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Tempest est né environ 1307, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Tempest, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Sherborn environ 1333, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé environ 1383, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Tempest um 1307 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Tempest 25 und seine Mutter Isabel 15. Er hat um 1333 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Catherine Sherborn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1383 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Tempest è nato il circa 1307 nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Tempest, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabel, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Sherborn circa 1333, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. Morì circa 1383, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.Carleton, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアカーレトン

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempestが約1307年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで生まれた時，父Sir John Tempestは25歳，母Isabelは15歳であった。約1333年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでCatherine Sherbornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1383年に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Tempest(이)가 대략 1307년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Tempest(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Catherine Sherborn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1383년 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1307–about 1383: tany ho any amin'ny 1307–tany ho any amin'ny 1383

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Tempest nasceu aproximadamente 1307, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Tempest, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Sherborn aproximadamente 1333, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1383, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Tempest родился около 1307 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Tempest было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Sherborn около 1333 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1383 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.

sm.about 1307–about 1383: e tusa o le 1307–e tusa o le 1383

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Tempest nació aproximadamente 1307, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Tempest, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Catherine Sherborn aproximadamente 1333, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió aproximadamente 1383, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años.
